title: Dishmatic Extra Heavy-Duty Refills, Perfect For Tough Stains, 3 Pack
features: Heavy-Duty: Make easy work of scrubbing tough residue from oven trays and rough surfaces
Not For Delicate Surfaces: For cleaning delicate and non-sick surfaces, try our non-scratch refills
Multi Pack: This handy trio sponge pack contains three extra heavy-duty sponges, the perfect trio for targeting tough stubborn stains
Interchangeable: Universally interchangeable sponges means Dishmatic always has a solution to every washing up challenge
Made in the UK: Dishmatic is the world’s No 1 provider of the refillable washing up handle where all our products are manufactured and assembled in the UK
